# Home Medix India Private Limited

Home Medix India Private Limited is a Bengaluru-based medical equipment manufacturer and supplier focused on respiratory care and home healthcare products for hospitals, clinics, home-care providers, dealers, and families across India.

Canonical site: https://homemedix.in/

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://homemedix.in/
- Products: https://homemedix.in/#products
- Solutions: https://homemedix.in/#solutions
- Quality and certifications: https://homemedix.in/#quality
- Knowledge hub: https://homemedix.in/#resources
- Contact: https://homemedix.in/#contact

Primary topics:
- Medical equipment manufacturing in India
- Medical equipment suppliers in Bengaluru
- Oxygen concentrators
- Compressor nebulizers
- Home healthcare equipment
- Anti-bedsore air mattresses
- Respiratory care equipment
- Medical examination gloves

Contact:
- Sales: +91 98860 12456
- Service: +91 95137 55596
- Email: sales@homemedix.in
